title: Smartbones 10 Chicken Sticks Rawhide Free Chew Dog Treats
features: Made from rawhide free, chewy meat and vegetables, which is easy to digest
Soft and chewy texture, for gentle chewers
Gentle on teeth and gums, helping clean teeth and support dental health through the abrasive action of chewing
Made with chicken and wholesome vegetables, vitamin and mineral enriched, for that taste that dogs can't resist
Extra low in fat for a healthier snack
description: From the manufacturer Classic Sticks With Delicious Chicken SmartBones are the tempting non-rawhide chews that dogs can’t resist! Our 100% non-rawhide and wheat-free ingredients make SmartBones not only low in fat but easy to digest. Helping to keep your dog healthy and their tails wagging for more! These chews are also vitamin and mineral enriched to ensure that the soft texture of our treats is gentler on gums and tums. The chicken sticks are available in the following sizes: Chicken Sticks (5 pieces / 10 pieces) Chicken Wrapped Sticks (5 pieces) Easily Digestable Our 100% delicious chews are easily digestible as they are made with no rawhide. Extra Low In Fat With irresistibly tasty chicken inside and vegetables outside - these scrumptious chews are low in fat Promotes Healthy Teeth & Gums SmartBones chews help satisfy a dog’s natural chewing instinct - which promotes healthy teeth and gums No artificial additives Free from artificial colours, flavours and preservatives Discover more delicious SmartBones products: Chicken Sticks Buying Options Chicken Chew Bones Buying Options Beef Chew Bones Buying Options Sweet Potato Chew Bones Buying Options Grill Masters Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 929 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,640 4.6 out of 5 stars 626 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,640 4.3 out of 5 stars 589 Variants Chicken Sticks, Wrapped Sticks Mini, Medium, Large Mini, Medium Mini, Medium Chicken, Beef, Pork, Lamb Flavours Chicken with Vegetables Chicken with Vegetables Chicken with Beef Flavour Sweet Potato with Vegetables Barbecue Flavour Low Fat ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ No Rawhide ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Vitamin & Mineral Enriched ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎After opening, reseal in the bag it comes in, or store in an airtight container to make sure they don’t dry and get crumbly.
specifications_table.Special features: ‎Rawhide-free, vitamin and mineral enriched, low fat
